title: Nursery Rhyme. CCVIII. Riddles.
content:
[Cleopatra.]

        The moon nine days old,
        The next sign to cancer;
        Pat rat without a tail; - 
        And now, sir, for your answer,
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCVIII. Riddles." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
